# CYP3A4-Metabolized Drugs (cyp3a4_substrates)

**3 rules.** Category: drug_metabolism

| canonical_id | db | severity | evidence | alert_headline | mechanism |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `berberine_supplement` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | established | May affect prescription drug levels | In-vitro CYP3A4 inhibition; clinical effect modest at typical doses (≥500 mg/day). Increasingly common in metabolic-health supplements. |
| `goldenseal` | ingredient_quality_map | avoid | established | Affects how many drugs are processed | Strong CYP3A4 inhibitor in vitro and in vivo (berberine + hydrastine). Also affects CYP2D6. |
| `schisandra_berry` | botanical_ingredients | caution | established | May affect prescription drug levels | Schizandrol-rich extracts inhibit CYP3A4. Some clinical interactions documented with tacrolimus and sirolimus. Common in adaptogen blends used by transplant-recovery population. |
